brief: Senator Lindsey Graham's death dominates headlines, with political fallout and tributes. Meanwhile, the US exchanges strikes with Iran over the Strait of Hormuz, and Apple's canceled car program leaves a legacy of AI chips. Academic papers cover visual analytics for missing data, AI-assisted crime linkage, and clinical brain-computer interfaces in China.
news_summary: Lindsey Graham, the Republican senator and Trump ally, died suddenly at 71, prompting mourning and questions about his successor. Other top stories include US-Iran tensions over the Strait of Hormuz and Apple's self-driving car program's unexpected contribution to AI chips.
papers_summary: Researchers introduce ImputeViz for diagnosing missing data, and an industrial study of AI in crime linkage. Also notable: a landscape analysis of brain-computer interface trials in China and a system for analyzing traditional Chinese painting compositions.

en.brief: Senator Lindsey Graham's death dominates headlines, with political fallout and tributes. Meanwhile, the US exchanges strikes with Iran over the Strait of Hormuz, and Apple's canceled car program leaves a legacy of AI chips. Academic papers cover visual analytics for missing data, AI-assisted crime linkage, and clinical brain-computer interfaces in China.
en.news_summary: Lindsey Graham, the Republican senator and Trump ally, died suddenly at 71, prompting mourning and questions about his successor. Other top stories include US-Iran tensions over the Strait of Hormuz and Apple's self-driving car program's unexpected contribution to AI chips.
en.papers_summary: Researchers introduce ImputeViz for diagnosing missing data, and an industrial study of AI in crime linkage. Also notable: a landscape analysis of brain-computer interface trials in China and a system for analyzing traditional Chinese painting compositions.

zh.brief: 颱風巴威兩度登陸浙江，近200萬人疏散，防災措施周密；美國參議員林賽·格雷厄姆猝逝，引發政壇震動。學術方面，多項研究探討可視化、AI輔助犯罪分析及腦機接口臨床轉化。
zh.news_summary: 颱風巴威一週內兩次登陸浙江，當地提前一週轉移人員、加固設施，近200萬人撤離；韓國寺廟舉辦30小時靜修相親活動，協助單身男女尋找伴侶；另有報導解釋蚊子偏好叮咬特定人群的原因。
zh.papers_summary: 本期論文涵蓋可視化儀表板用於診斷缺失數據、AI在犯罪串聯分析中的應用、以及中國腦機接口臨床試驗的現狀分析等主題。

todays_image.caption: The gavel that once fell in Judge Terrell’s courtroom now echoes the silent passing of Senator Graham’s authority, leaving an empty seat in Congress.
todays_image.source_name: National Museum of African American History and Culture
todays_image.title: Gavel used by Judge Robert Terrell
